title: lastrea athamantica
intro: Lastrea athamantica, also known as the Athamantus fern or Athamantus lady fern, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea athamantica lie in its ability to be used as a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues. The health benefits of consuming Lastrea athamantica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the overall urinary system. In traditional herbal medicine, Lastrea athamantica is prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots or rhizomes, or used as a tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water.
